name: remote-job-search-extension
description: Chrome extension for profile-based, keyword-driven remote job search and application assistance across major job boards and curated career sites.

scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:tools
scripts.test:features: vitest run tests/featureMatrix.test.ts tests/shared.test.ts tests/shared.storage.test.ts tests/popup.test.ts tests/background.test.ts tests/jobSearch.test.ts tests/searchResults.test.ts tests/apply.test.ts tests/autofill.test.ts tests/runtimeHelpers.test.ts
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:coverage && npm run typecheck:all && npm run build
scripts.test:full: npm run test:ci && npm run test:smoke
